creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text: A quarterly branch 2023Q4 has been branched off today.  If you want the build fix to go into that branch, you can either backport it to 0.258 (i.e. make a second patch with just the build fix) or you can ask that the whole commit will be merged into the quarterly branch.  To do so, set the merge-quarterly flag to "?".
